message:
chore(deps): bump franken-decision, franken-evidence, franken-kernel to 0.2.9

Update internal workspace dependency versions from 0.2.8 to 0.2.9
accompanying the feature work in this batch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -362,7 +362,7 @@ checksum = "d9c4f5dac5e15c24eb999c26181a6ca40b39fe946cbe4c263c7209467bc83af2"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -371,15 +371,15 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.2.8"
+version = "0.2.9"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
